---
output: github_document
---

<!-- Source for docs/working-papers.md (GitHub Pages).
     These PDFs are PUBLIC and hosted in the repo (data-raw/working-papers/);
     each entry links to the file on GitHub. Build with data-raw/scripts/render.R
     (knit_root_dir = repo root). -->

```{r wp, echo=FALSE, results="asis"}
dir      <- "data-raw/working-papers"
base_url <- "https://github.com/ftsiboe/ftsiboe/blob/main/data-raw/working-papers"

cat("Pre-prints and works in progress. PDFs are hosted in this repository and free to read or download.\n\n")

files <- sort(list.files(dir, pattern = "\\.pdf$"))
if (length(files) == 0) {
  cat("*(no working papers yet)*\n")
} else {
  for (f in files) {
    title <- tools::toTitleCase(gsub("[_-]+", " ", tools::file_path_sans_ext(f)))
    url   <- paste0(base_url, "/", utils::URLencode(f))
    cat(sprintf("- [%s](%s)\n", title, url))
  }
}
```

---

[Home](https://ftsiboe.github.io/) · [Publications](https://ftsiboe.github.io/risk-management/) · [Software](https://ftsiboe.github.io/r-packages/) · [Replication Packages](https://ftsiboe.github.io/replication-packages/) · [Research Metrics](https://ftsiboe.github.io/metrics/)
